items.label: Table of Contents
items.note: Lists books and page numbers. Recommended for most editions.

items.label: Book Introductions
items.note: Brief intro text per book. Page count depends on scope.

items.label: Cross-references
items.note: Adds inline column space; doesn't add pages directly. Requires cross-ref data in project.

items.label: Footnotes
items.note: Inline text notes. Adds space within existing pages.

items.label: Study Notes
items.note: Extended notes. Significantly increases page count for study editions.

items.label: Glossary
items.note: Defines key terms. Requires glossary file in project.

items.label: Concordance
items.note: Word index with references. Adds significant bulk.

items.label: Strong's Index
items.note: Greek/Hebrew lexicon index. Large addition, for study Bibles.

items.label: Parallel Passages
items.note: Gospel harmony or parallel passage reference.

items.label: Maps
items.note: Geographic maps. Requires map files in project.

items.label: Illustrations
items.note: Inline artwork. Affects page flow but not total page count directly.
